theme: The Welcome Mat v2 + Templates — Streamlined First-Run Experience & Sprint/Ticket Templates

shots.title: Sprint & ticket templates — define standard templates for sprint plans and tickets with full specs (I WANT TO, SO THAT, BACKGROUND, OBJECTIVES, ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA, TECHNICAL NOTES, DEPENDENCIES, GOTCHAS)
shots.notes: Created .slope/templates/sprint-plan.md and .slope/templates/ticket.md with full template specs. Added ticket.schema.json for machine-readable validation. Updated roadmap.json with extended ticket format.

shots.title: Auto-detect coding harness during init — detect from CLI flags, env vars, or prompt via harness
shots.notes: Added detectHarnessFromEnvironment() and detectHarnessFromCLI() functions. Enhanced detectAllHarnesses() to combine env vars, CLI presence, and project files. Priority: env > CLI > project files.

shots.title: Install relevant harness plugin/adapter based on detected harness — slope init installs the correct MCP/server adapter automatically
shots.notes: Already implemented in existing init flow - detectAllHarnesses() feeds directly into installForProvider() loop. Works for all supported harnesses.

shots.title: slope init --migrate — upgrade config from older SLOPE versions
shots.notes: Already implemented! Handles slopeVersion migration and detectedStack addition. Exit early after migration.

shots.title: Post-init validation — run doctor checks after init to confirm setup
shots.notes: Added automatic doctor command run at end of init (unless --skip-doctor flag is passed). Shows post-init validation summary.

conditions: S62-1 detection covers: Claude Code (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY), OpenCode (OPENCODE_API_KEY), Cursor (CURSOR_SESSION_ID), Cline (CLANE_API_KEY), Windsurf (CODEIUM_EXTENSION), OB1 (OB1_API_KEY)
S62-1 also checks CLI presence: claude, opencode, cursor, cline, windsurf, ob1 commands
special_plays: S62-2 and S62-3 were already partially implemented - just needed integration
All 5 tickets completed in one session
yardage_book_updates: Environment variables are the most reliable detection signal - checked first
CLI presence helps when env vars aren't set but harness is installed
Project directory detection is fallback for existing projects
course_management_notes: Clean sweep - all 5 tickets completed with no hazards
S62-0 templates provide foundation for future ticket planning
S62-1 S62-2 S62-4 work together for seamless init experience
slope_factors: Existing adapter framework made S62-1 integration straightforward
Metaphor-aware templates in template-generator.ts informed S62-0 structure
